lessons.text: Story sent back ('Tonight in Saline Twp: Data Center Update on agenda'): we need back story on this. what does the agenda say? what's inside? we need details with a headline that will make me care even 30 minutes away. thanks

Story sent back ('Democratic Senate candidates clash over AI data center regulation in d'): too many social posts.. we only need a few a day.. also i'm looking for social posts from political leaders with comments.. and a mix of democrat and republican

Story killed ('Haley Stevens non-answer on data centers prompts essay reference'): too many social posts.. we only need a few a day.. also i'm looking for social posts from political leaders with comments.. and a mix of democrat and republican
Story sent back ('John James criticized for data center builder donations amid attacks'): the person with the x post is not a big name.. just a random rant it seems so we will not be using it.

Story sent back ('Saline Twp Board Agenda Includes Data Center Update'): what is the back story? what happened at the last meeting? research other media reports. write this is a little news story. the word update should never be in the headline. find me what the story is actually about and incorporate the stakes and impac

Story killed ('Dowagiac Residents Report Persistent Noise From Nearby Data Center Dis'): we cannot link to this story because they are linking to an mlive report. this is not vice's original reporting.
